## Linked Issue

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet format --verify-no-changes`
- [ ] `dotnet build`
- [ ] `dotnet test`
- [ ] Coverage reviewed
- [ ] Manual Windows validation attached, if required

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Default behavior is non-mutating or explicitly confirmed
- [ ] User paths and sensitive data are redacted where appropriate
- [ ] Cancellation/error paths are handled
- [ ] Docs updated for user-visible changes
